title: El genio alegre
writer: Fernando Delgado, Jacinto Álvarez Quintero, Joaquín Álvarez Quintero
actors: Leocadia Alba, Concha Catalá, Lolita Astolfi
plot: In an Andalusian village lives a rich and austere family whose son and heir worries her mother with his fun-loving lifestyle. When joyful Consolación comes to her aunt's home she will quite upset their life, and things will begin ...
